title: Dense Almond Paste Crumble
description: A festive French dessert featuring almond paste and garlic for a unique twist on traditional crumbles, suitable for those with gluten sensitivities.

ingredients.name: Almond Paste
ingredients.notes: Gluten-free almond paste can be found in many health food stores or online.

ingredients.name: All-Purpose Gluten-Free Flour Blend
ingredients.notes: Use a blend that includes xanthan gum for better texture.

ingredients.name: Almond Milk
ingredients.notes: Any unsweetened plant-based milk can be used.

ingredients.name: Nutella (optional)
ingredients.notes: Can be used as a topping or for spreading between layers if making a layered version.

instructions: Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C). Grease and line a 9x13-inch baking dish with parchment paper.
In a large mixing bowl, combine almond paste, flour blend, almond milk, garlic powder, and sugar. Mix until smooth but still slightly crumbly.
Fold in the coarse ground almonds and any Nutella if using. The mixture should hold together when pressed lightly between your fingers.
Transfer the crumble to the prepared dish. You can spread it more evenly with a spatula for an even layer, or keep it somewhat uneven for visual appeal.
Bake for 25-30 minutes or until golden brown and set in the center. Let cool before serving.
Serve warm as dessert with whipped cream, ice cream, or your favorite topping.
